notes: This is a starter benchmark for the current 25-item corpus slice.
Queries should be judged across whole-page retrieval, blended retrieval, and future region-aware retrieval.

queries.intent: Find issues and pages involving Churchill and British ceremonial/public scenes.
success_criteria: Top results should include pages from the coronation period or nearby index material.
Evidence should mention Churchill, coronation, London, Westminster Abbey, or clearly adjacent ceremonial context.
failure_modes_to_watch: Results are only broadly British without Churchill-level specificity.
Summaries are plausible but the evidence text is too generic to trust.

queries.intent: Find Japan travel/reportage pages and test place-heavy retrieval.
success_criteria: Top results should include Japan-related issues or index references.
Evidence should surface Tokyo, Kyoto, Fuji, or clearly matching descriptions.
failure_modes_to_watch: Results collapse into generic travel or crowd scenes.
The page theme is right but specific locations are missing from evidence.

queries.intent: Test place-plus-architecture retrieval and issue grouping.
success_criteria: Top results should cluster around Spain issues or index pages.
Evidence should include place names or architecture-related descriptions.
failure_modes_to_watch: Results are geographically adjacent but not clearly Spanish.
Architecture is inferred from sketches without grounded evidence.

queries.intent: Test sketch-description retrieval when text is weak or partial.
success_criteria: At least one top result should show a strongly portrait-dominant page.
The explanation or source text should make it clear the match came from sketch semantics.
failure_modes_to_watch: Portrait-heavy pages are missed because text lanes dominate ranking.
Results mention people but do not actually surface visually relevant pages.

queries.query: index contents list people places dates
queries.intent: Test whether index-like pages are retrievable as a distinct document behavior.
success_criteria: Index or list-like pages should appear near the top.
Evidence should show dense names, places, dates, or list structure.
failure_modes_to_watch: Results are merely text-heavy rather than index-like.
Pages surface without any sign of list or index structure.

queries.intent: Stress-test the weak lane where v1 is least trustworthy.
success_criteria: Approaches should at least surface handwriting-heavy or mixed-layout pages.
Region-aware approaches should eventually outperform whole-page retrieval here.
failure_modes_to_watch: Results are entirely driven by typeset text or generic page summaries.

queries.query: page with sketches text blocks sidebars and captions
queries.intent: Test mixed-layout retrieval and expose whether page-level summaries are too coarse.
success_criteria: Results should include pages with multiple region types present.
The evidence surface should make the mixed-layout nature legible.
failure_modes_to_watch: Broad summary matches dominate without showing component evidence.
Pages with only one strong modality crowd out genuinely mixed pages.
